essence: One-line check to the agent asking whether an offered prompt would add value to the POEM work already done in the session — no answer captured.

David kicks off a POEM session to put the Claude 3.7 decks in place, telling the agent a little creative deviation is allowed rather than exactly following previous systems, and prepares to hand over login details.

Fourth time re-orienting a fresh agent conversation: the workflow is at step 5 of 37 (not awaiting-QA), and David vents that the agent keeps forgetting the workflow docs they just spent time fixing — cross-conversation context loss is the recurring pain.

loop.label: agent forgets workflow state across conversations

essence: Research question logged after the mall trip: why do Stream Decks (every one David has owned) fail through USB hubs and only work reliably plugged directly into a USB-C port on the computer — noting Elgato even sells a dedicated USB hub for Stream Deck.

actions.text: Research why Stream Decks fail through USB hubs vs direct USB-C connection

essence: Over drinks the Chiang Mai crew jokes about ambassador roles for OMI (and Anthropic), agreeing that kind of work should automatically sit under a work/agents category; Nick declared the smartest of the four — no decisions made.

A Chiang Mai friend (US farm exit, returned to VC for his kids' security) walks through early- vs late-stage fund economics (10% early vs 1.5% at Series A, 500 Startups thesis) and his Singapore McDonald's wallet deal that Apple Pay's corporate deal killed; with AI his fund has turned conservative and builds internal projects — Kybernesis named as internal to the fund — driven by 'one more shot' at something big before retiring to the farm.

Mall crawl with the crew comparing hardware controllers (Stream Deck Neo/Plus/XL/Studio, RODE Streamer X, Logitech MX Creator Console, Razer, generic macro pads) for programmable vibe-coding controls concludes the Stream Deck Plus has the best first-class plugin SDK (key/dial/touch events plus feedback to device); decision: buy a Neo immediately to experiment and order the Plus online (available ~Jan 13).

actions.text: Buy Stream Deck Neo immediately to experiment with

essence: Crew debrief on Thailand's proposed 3-billion-baht Digital Hub — an economic zone with its own incentive mechanisms to attract tech companies; policy largely authored by 'Dr. Pat', with an NDA chairman (chamber-of-commerce property owner) facilitating introductions; the group rates its likelihood at ~80%, no next steps set.
